title: Manhattan Dark Zone
summary: The initial containment zone where first-wave Agents are abandoned and where supply drops create a dangerous scavenging economy.

claims.text: The immediate response to the outbreak attempts to contain it within the Dark Zone.
First-wave Division Agents are abandoned in the Dark Zone, where most are killed or go rogue.
Frequent supply drops for trapped survivors and Agents make the Dark Zone lucrative for scavengers.

paragraphs.text: The Dark Zone begins as a containment measure but becomes the place where the first wave collapses and emergency supply flows attract scavengers, setting conditions for rogue Agents and faction power.

verification.notes: This overview covers the original Manhattan Dark Zone, not the separate Dark Zones in The Division 2.
